Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Nov-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ASSET CAPITAL RECOVERY GROUP, LLC's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Written order and judgment signed.
